programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Run's blood boils upon finding that his backyard pool house has become filled with family junk. He vows to clean it out, which unleashes conflict with every family member who wants to hang onto some possession.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Run often talks about how much he loves to win, but it's not until we see his family compete against one another that we understand that the drive to dominate runs thick in the Simmons blood.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: After overindulging at Russell Simmons' remarkable star-studded charity bash in the Hamptons, Justine decides to go on a diet. Determined to make it work, she enlists the help of a personal trainer.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: When Vanessa gets a call from her Ford modeling agent to do a fashion shoot in Colorado, Run decides that bringing the family along for a summer vacation would be the perfect adventure to share before school starts.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Season Five kicks off when Rev Run home for a short visit in between gigs of his concert tour with good pal, Kid Rock.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: The episode begins with Rev Run on stage in what is his final performance of his tour with Kid Rock. Rev returns home and his hopes of getting his diet back on track are thwarted by Russy's new cooking hobby.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: With the final mix of their debut album just around the corner, Team Blackout takes the next step in their pursuit of ultimate rap dominance: self-promotion.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Making the Honor Roll has been something Rev and Justine have come to expect from Diggy and Russy over the years. So when their latest report cards show them not making it, Rev confronts the boys about it.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: A trip to the orthodontist for Diggy and Russy brings the family some surprising news: That Russy will be getting his braces off before Diggy, who will have to wait another two months.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie navigates life as a single man following a public breakup with Joseline. Joc and Scrappy plan a boys' night out. Stevie's daughters organize a garage sale to help their dad get rid of the past and start anew. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Ray J is in town and Stevie and the boys are excited to show him a good time. Meanwhile, Stevie is surprised to find himself falling for an old friend. But she might not be as excited about starting a relationship as he is. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie challenges Yung Joc to a comedy contest and learns stand-up comedy is a lot harder than it looks. Stevie's daughters won't stop fighting, so Stevie enlists a secret weapon to bring them back together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie competes with Yung Joc and Scrappy to see who will represent the new brand. Stevie tries to help Tommie move forward with a new career choice. Meanwhile, Faith Evans is having second thoughts about rejecting Stevie J. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. and Tiny are back and taking the kids into the wilderness for some good ole fashion family camping. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. is headlining this summer's hottest hip hop concert but can he tackle the pressure of the big stage after being away for so long? Also, Tameka has a surprise for T.I. he won't soon forget. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka's talk show was picked up and the ladies are getting ready for production. Shekinah is feeling out of the loop, but can she win Tameka over and get a spot on the show? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. and Tiny's oldest daughter Niq Niq is turning 16 and T.I. wants to throw her the party of the year. But when it comes time for Niq Niq to get her dream car, Tip has other plans. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I., Tiny, and Shekinah are Chicago bound. While T.I. promotes his upcoming album, Shekinah drags Tiny all through the windy city looking for her idol, Oprah. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After seeing T.I. on the set of a popular television series, Domani is convinced acting is easy. Wanting to teach his young son a lesson prompts T.I. to encourage his children to make their own movie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After catching his family eating junk food, Tip decides it's time for them to get in shape! With money on the line, Tameka, Shekinah and the kids are put to the test. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tip notices the kids are missing out on certain skills he got from his old neighborhood. Trying to toughen them up, they hit the boxing gym where Major tries to take on his older brother. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After King's pet hamster passes away, the kids beg their dad for a dog. When Tameka makes an interesting offer on behalf of the children, Tip puts the kids through a test to see if they are responsible enough for a dog. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Ja Rule gets Punk'd when Brittney brings home a pretend boyfriend to prove she's not a kid anymore. Jeff and Jordy put their lives on the line when Grandma Debra attempts to teach Grandma Jean how to drive.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: When Ja has a concert in NYC, Jeff turns Brittney's low key night with friends into a raging house party. The grannies use Ja's performance as an excuse to go man hunting.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Jordy goes on his first date with help from Ja and Brittney. After being grounded for slacking off at school, Jeff sneaks out of the house to go to a strip club.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Ja becomes Mr. Mom and quickly learns that a woman's work is never done. Brittney transforms into 'Bri-yonce' in hopes of finding her Jay-Z at a college costume party.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Brittney brings her new boyfriend home for Thanksgiving, and Ja gets more information about their relationship than he bargained for. The grannies compete to see who can bake the best pie.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole Murphy, Andrea Kelly, Sheree Fletcher, Jessica Conseco, and Mayte Garcia are out to establish themselves as independent, successful women and bring relevance and honor to themselves separate from their very famous exes.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Despite warnings from her friends, Jessica seriously considers letting Jose move back in with her. Anxious to meet Mr. Right, Mayte resorts to a professional matchmaker, who urges her to de-Prince her home.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Just when Jessica thinks she might still be in love with Jose, she receives a bombshell from him. Meanwhile, Sheree and Terrell find themselves at odds over their long-distance marriage.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Anxious to escape the stress in their lives, the ladies head to Napa Valley for a weekend of fine food, fine wine, and (hopefully) fine men. On the trip, Jessica confronts Jose about his bad choices and gives him an ultimatum.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole sets Mayte up on her first blind date, which stresses Mayte out. Meanwhile, Jessica breaks the news about Jose to Josie and then is shocked to learn that Josie is planning a visit to Planned Parenthood.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Tony sets Andrea up on a date with a local friend, but she worries how he will react when he finds out that R. Kelly is her ex. Meanwhile, Mayte plans a big party for her mother's birthday.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Controversy erupts during a weekend getaway to Palm Springs after Jessica accuses the others of being hypocrites. Not one to take it lightly, Sheree calls Jessica out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Back in L.A., resentments are still simmering after the altercation in Palm Springs. Mayte, who receives bad news from a fertility expert, is especially sensitive and confronts Jessica during a ladies night out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: The ladies take sides after the confrontation between Mayte and Jessica. Meanwhile, Andrea starts to feel pressure from Percy and worries that their relationship is moving too quickly.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Mayte and Jessica attempt to repair their damaged relationship. Meanwhile, Sheree pitches her skin product, Whoop-Ash, to a trendy Hollywood boutique and Nicole prepares a public showing of her new clothing line.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: In this dramatic season finale, the ladies rehearse a number for Andrea's upcoming dance benefit, during which one of them has a serious and painful accident. With less than an hour before showtime, an ambulance is called...

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Karen and Drita prepare to meet, Renee calls in the help of a shaman, and Big Ang throws a dinner party in hopes of bringing all the women together.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Joy Behar hosts as the Mob Wives sit down for an intense and explosive reunion. Renee and her sister, Jenn, address Junior becoming an informant for the FBI. Ramona and Drita's simmering animosity boils over into complete chaos.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Carla's husband, Joe, and Karen's baby daddy, Dave, sit down to explain their chaotic love lives. Big Ang explains the truth behind her arrest and her issues with her husband, Neal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Power versus Speed kicks off WOW as Reina Del Rey and Wrecking Ball take on Chantilly Chella and Foxxy Fierce in Tag Team action. Then, newcomer Crystal Waters who is one half of the freshest tag team in WOW: Spring Break 24/7 tries her hand at singles.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW main event promises to be a slobber knocker as the indomitable Kandi Krush challenges the WOW World Champion Penelope Pink of the Fabulous Four! Will Krush land a knockout?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's an episode of all tag team matches!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Main Event is a 3-person match up with the might of the Island Dynasty, Tiki Chamorro, and Tonga Twins, Kona and Kaoz wrestling the Monsters of Madness, Chainsaw, Holidead and Voodoo.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In the Main Event, the WOW World Champion Penelope Pink joins her Fabulous Four teammate Vickie Lynn McCoy to face the ferocious duo of Kandi Krush and Princess Aussie in tag team action. Can the underdogs get the upset against the Fabulous Two?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In tonight's main event, can spirit overcome dominance when Coach's team of Ariel Sky and Randi Rah Rah challenge Miami's Sweet Heat, The Carlson Twins for the WOW Tag Team Championships!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After weeks of domination, two tag teams battle for the #1 contender's spot for the WOW Tag Team Championships.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Chantilly Chella attempts to dropkick her way through WOW's scariest monster, Chainsaw. GiGi Gianni and Tiki Chamorro have been impressive in their WOW rookie years, but only one can move up the ladder.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Foxxy Fierce looks to skate her way to victory against the leaping Robbie Rocket. Then, we'll see the Luchadora superstar, Tormenta, take on WOW's youngest Superhero, Jennifer Florez. Can the small but fast Gen Z star out-wrestle the experienced Tormenta?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight's hour of power kicks off with 3 on 3 action. Fury will be teaming up with her mortal enemies—Siren the Voodoo Doll and Holidead to face Americana and Spring Break 24/7, Sandy Shore and Crystal Waters? This one should be a tidal wave of action!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Luchadora, Tormenta and Rave Queen, Chantilly battle in the famed purple ring. Former tag team champions, Coach Campanelli and Randi Rah Rah try to turn around their rotten luck. A:nd new tag team sensation, Las Bandidas will attempt to take it all.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: From the breaking of The Beast ankle, to the shocking attack in the parking lot, to the championship chase that resulted in thousands of LA Comic Con Fans witnessing the crowning of a new WOW World

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast Returns! It's a new day in WOW-Women Of Wrestling! The Fabulous Lana Star's WOW World Champion Penelope Pink, formerly on the hunt for the coveted WOW title, finds that the tables have turned as the whole roster is in pursuit of her championship

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Opportunity is knocking as Las Bandidas: Sylvia Sanchez and Vivian Rivera's dream to become WOW World Tag Team Champions could become a reality due to Sophia Lopez's legal strategies and manipulations. Will they be ready when they get their opportunity?

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A banker with a consuming thirst for vengeance hires Randall to accompany him to track down the man he believes responsible for his son's death and a bank robbery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is deputized to transport a ruthless killer to Tucson but exchanges him for the nun kidnapped by the killer's gang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall brings a suspected murderer to Pot Hole but fears the man won't receive a fair trial when he finds the townspeople in the grip of a power-mad bully.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Josh, as a favor to a friend, escorts a beautiful woman to a trial that could see her hang for killing her husband, her lover, and a foreman, she charms him to convince her of her innocenences.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is asked by Stacy Torrance for help when she finds a wanted poster under her door - for her for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh sets out to help a heartbroken wife locate her missing husband, but his mission of mercy meets with a resistant and tight-lipped townspeople.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is bushwhacked by bounty hunters in cahoots with the local sheriff, who now must keep Josh from blowing the whistle on their illegal but lucrative \\"bounty game\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A sadistic pair of killers escape from prison who have no qualms about killing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Following an Indian attack on their stagecoach that kills his prisoner, Randall and an eastern gentleman unaccustomed to the ways of the West must trek to safety across many long, hot miles of hostile Apache territory.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On Christmas, Eve Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet from a young boy who has eight cents to pay: bring in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Thieves are lying in wait to ambush mail carriers and eventually Josh is hired to help ensure that the mail will get through.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is knocked out by a posse who wants his prisoner who is wanted for killing his step-daughter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh needs to get his wounded prisoner to Bannach in three days to prevent an innocent man from hanging.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a small town looking for Vic Warsaw but is told by the Sheriff that Warsaw was buried that day and killed by Miss Lucy Fremont the night before.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Four men break out of prison looking for revenge against Aben Starr who turned them in after their first escape attempt.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is resting in Benson when two bounty hunters bring in a man - the mayor - dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to assist and protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and wanted sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Beau wins the town of Silver Hill in a poker game, he finds it's atop a worthless mine, and a railroad agent is trying to cheat the townspeople out of their land.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When an officer taking prisoners across the desert is wounded in hostile territory, Bart must take over and is caught between the charms of a woman prisoner and a pending attack.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Beau and Bart discover a phony wire transfer company run by crooks. It's up to them to devise a scheme to recover their money and put the company out of business.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin rides upon a man named Stryker hanging from a tree. When he learns Paladin is after the same man but with a warrant, he says he has stronger reasons and hopes he won't get in his way.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Repaying a debt, Paladin rides to Valley Heart. Sheriff Reagan awaits the return of a native son who has been jailed for the past six years.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is after a man suspected of killing a marshal. After finally capturing him in the desert he claims his innocence.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Hogtooth gets more ridicule than usual, when 3 gunmen take over the town, after cleaning it up. Each was hired in secret by a town council member, so the enforcers band together to suck Hogtooth dry.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin rides to the San Luis Rey church in search of a very old brandy. When he is asked by the Padre to retrieve a statue of worship, they strike a bargain where they both may get what they want.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Sweetwater was a wild town before Thomas Carey, a retired Army scout and old friend of Paladin, became marshal. But Carey has taken over complete control and turned into a killer.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: A doctor who once saved Paladin's life calls upon him to find and safely bring back the son of a one-time sweetheart.The young man has "taken to the hills" to track down his father's killer.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin meets a drunken Col Lacey at the Carlton. He is there fearful of going home to his lovely wife after being away for some time seeking his fortune.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Adams, the prosecutor, wants to hire Paladin to rid the town of someone he says is getting away with murder.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin rides into a Texas town at Christmas time and encounters a saloon full of merrymakers. Soon afterward a cowboy brings in a pregnant girl who may not survive the impending birth.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An enraged Apache bravely kills the white man who murdered his father. Both Sheriff Hollister and the victim's brother pursue the Indian -- with very different goals -- and trap him in a box canyon that the Apache has rigged with dynamite.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunman Nate Crandall murders a rancher to steal $20,000. Sheriff Hollister gets to the loot first and locks it in a safe. Determined to get the money, Crandall involves young Jim Edwards in a plot to rob the safe and take the fall for the killing.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Reverend Tuttle is aboard the stagecoach when it is robbed by three masked gunmen. Sheriff Hollister suspects Big Jim Sten, boss of a nearby town, is behind the robbery. But when the reverend and Hollister visit Sten's town, a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Jett Sergeant, son of a notorious outlaw, sees Hollister kill his father in a shootout and vows he will kill the Sheriff. Clay tries to set him straight, but the youth teams up with two of his father's henchmen in a plot a murder the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Frank Leslie returns to Tombstone to marry the widow of the man he killed and pledges never to use guns again. But four brothers of Leslie's victim come to Tombstone intent on revenge, putting his oath to the test.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister and Claibourne journey to a neighboring town and find it evacuated in anticipation of the arrival of an outlaw band. Clay and the editor are captured and the leader of the marauders is killed as a new outlaw takes command.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister has to fire a young deputy for being 'trigger-happy.' The youngster takes a job as a guard in the Saloon, where he unnecessarily guns down a popular rancher, and when Hollister orders him out of town, the young man defies him.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A Mexican bandito, Augustine Ramirez, has been crossing the border into Tombstone Territory to prey on the ranchers and then retreating to Mexico, where international law protects him. Hollister goes undercover to infiltrate the bandit's lair.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister learns that the hatchet men of a powerful Chinese society are on a mission to find a society member's girlfriend who has been hidden away by a Chinese Quarter resident. Hollister faces a type of danger unfamiliar to the West.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Suspicious of a possible connection between a daring payroll robbery and the shooting of a postmaster in the mining district, Sheriff Hollister and the postman's wife stage a grim and dangerous maneuver to lure the culprits out into the open.

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts. If Joey wins, he'll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
